reviews.review_description: you pretty much have to pay to play, you wanna lobby with full players who nobody has the alien or full game and you're just stuck at a standstill literally in the main menu says rate is five stars and they'll give you 3000 glory points or something that's literally just Devs bribing the players to make the  game look good .this game would probably have a much bigger player base if they made it free to all players and still gave the benefits of people who paid for it. i'm sorry but this is just money hungry.

Sure the idea and the tutorial  make it seem like a fun game, the bullsh!t starts when you realize that the only way your can play the full game is through "premium pass" which is stupid as hell, they don't     instead of adding a price tag on the game like any other normal game dev, they gotta scam you into thinking the game is "free" even when you get into the game with other people, someone has to be the monster, the real scam is that you realize to be the monster, you have to buy the premium version of the game, which, if you don't have anyone that has the premium version then you can't play at all, to put it short: this game is a scam, don't get it

developer_response.body: As it explicitly says at the top of the store page, the game is 100% free for the astronaut role, and requires an alien to start the match. Thank you for downloading our free game.

reviews.review_description: This game is good and feels authentic but locking the alien behind a paywall doesn’t sound bad….until you realize to even start the game you need someone to be the alien for the game to start you can lock the other parts behind a paywall that’s fine but locking the only way to play the actual game behind a paywall is crazy work.I understand making money from a FREE game but sitting in a lobby with screaming kids saying “does anyone have alien?” As some constructive criticism either make the game payed again OR let people use the Alien without needing to buy the DLC

developer_response.body: The game is free, and there is no cost to play as the astronaut class.  However,  in the most  recent  update,  we are allowing free players to  play as the alien every 5th match. It's our middle ground  to allow free players the opportunity to play as alien occasionally,  while also respecting our loyal paid players who are supporting the game.  Players are loving this new feature, and we hope  you log back in and give it a 2nd  shot.

reviews.review_description: I absolutely love the goosebumps i get when im in a dark hall way and all of a sudden a big roar happens and the graphics are stunning it also feels very balanced between the aliens and crew with all these cool new updates it has its basically replayable for a long long time this is one of the best games on the store the only thing im left hoping for is more game modes absolutely fantastic work one of the best development teams out there much love keep up the stunning work -R4

developer_response.body: There's a lot in the pipeline as long as players like you keep coming back. Thanks for being part of the community!

reviews.review_description: It's a great game, I also like how they added that you can play alien for free after playing 5 rounds (I think it's 5 rounds.) and they try to fix bugs as quickly as possible or give tips on how to fix it. The only real complaints is how the game eats your battery life, although that's not a really big issue. and how you need to be lvl 20 to play as the titan, because from my personal experience, it's just really hard and time consuming to level up. And because you can't really lvl up when you don't buy the full game (I think so at least) you'll never really play as the titan if you're purely f2p

developer_response.body: We want the Fresh Meat (free) players to at least have a taste of the full game. So glad you like that addition. 🙏  Free players can't level up, but they can do everything else.  Make sure you're claiming your daily glory points for achievements in game so you can upgrade your spacesuit.

reviews.review_title: Played for a few months game is great
reviews.review_description: The free game allows you to play as an engineer that can complete tasks with each task providing a match wide benefit and a gun that will help you fight back against the alien. The movement is all just flying through space but there is a lot to learn about how to use it in the best way to outskill your opponent. At the end of the game when the armory is unlocked and the alien evolves it feels a lot like an exciting final boss fight against a scary monster. Don’t let the one star reviews fool you this game is absolutely worth a try. Yes you have to pay for the alien, the devs have to be able to fund the game somehow. However they have given away copies of the game for free the last few months and made it so you can play alien for free every 4th match. There are plenty of players out there that can play alien for you and ensure you get into a match. The devs even come and play on Friday and teach new players or take suggestions on the game. They even dropped a new map yesterday and have a roadmap planned for new aliens game modes and maps. I can’t stress it enough don’t let any bad reviews fool you just load up the game give it a try and you really might like it. I could use some help exterminating these aliens.

developer_response.body: Wow, thanks for this incredibly helpful review.

reviews.review_description: The game itself is super fun, fun movement, fun puzzles, fun gameplay. And in theory the game is pretty much perfect. But, me and lots of other players I’ve met find It frustrating that you NEED an alien player to start, especially when the alien role is behind a paywall. So here’s my fix, add bot aliens. Im not saying to remove the paywall, just make the game playable for players without that option. And if not that, at least reserve the 5th player slot in a server to alien players only, cus it sucks when you’re in an almost full server and an astronaut joins and now it’s impossible to start the match. All in all though, it’s a great game and I’m super excited to see it grow. You’re on to something great, just add bot aliens and the single problem with the game is fixed. Keep up the good work👏👏.

developer_response.body: We're working on something you will like very much, and it's rolling out in a week or so.  Stay patient, and thanks for the good review.    We appreciate having you in the community.

reviews.review_description: I pre purchased this game.  I was happy enough to give it a 5 but I have not played the game for a month or so and then it kept asking me to purchase the full version.   I thought I already had the full version and it was a bug that this kept popping up.  Then I was in a full lobby and no one could select the alien.   I was able to reach out to the team on discord and they responded very quickly and resolved the problem.   I love how the maneuverability is very zero gravity.   Graphics are great along with the controls.   Takes some getting used to but that's the fun.  Extremely terrifying when you are the engineer just hearing doors breaking and then looking behind you only to see the alien.  Keeps me laughing, especially with a full lobby with a good group.  I would definitely recommend this game.  Thanks to FUNTRAIN for fixing my problem quickly and painlessly.

developer_response.body: Our pleasure!  Thanks for being part of the community.

reviews.review_description: Its a fairly good game, my only gripe with the game is that you need to hope that someone has to have to be alien and that xp is behind a paywall, really i think you could reduce xp gain by like 90% for free players so they could still play. Besides that its a good game, really fun and sometimes scary, good job.

This game is advertised as a free experience but you have to pay to play as the monster completely removing any aspect of fun and turning it into a pay 2 play game. Either advertise it as a paid experience or make it free

My second game the alien escorted me to medbay unit after disabling my suit, the community is awesome. The game is so fun, and allowing people to play alien even without the full game makes it even better. This game is funny and scary at the same time. The controls are so fluid it is fun being on a team and being the alien.
100% would recommend
I also met 

Dug, he was really nice showing a new player how to play, like i said great community.


Dug if you're reading this, add the thumbs up update
So far I've played this game and it is VERY exciting. The tension of wandering a sort of abandoned ship is very fun. I like how this game is space related because not a lot of games are like that.

developer_response.body: Thank you.  We're glad you're enjoying the atmosphere.

reviews.review_title: Going Free to play was the best decision
reviews.review_description: Last time I had posted a review I had complained about there not being much content but after playing a lot more I have to say the game does get repetitive only after 2 hour session per day which is a good thing. I think blackgate needs just a bit more content though one map and one alien would be awesome. ever since the game went free to play I can always find a good lobby when I wanna get on rather than taking a gamble on if people are gonna be on. If you are a fan of the asymmetric genre of games you should give it a try it's free there's no risk. The games had been rebalanced to make playing alien a whole lot less dreadfull and now it's really fun but I think they made the killer a tad bit strong a few small tweaks and the game will be prefectly balanced.Blackgate just needs a little bit more content and a few small balance changes then I will finally be able to give it five stars

developer_response.body: Thanks for the kind words.  We definitely have more content updates planned if all goes well.   We now have 2 alien evolutions, and a new map is coming in about a month. There will be plenty to keep you busy.

developer_response.body: Hi Tony, sorry you are having this issue. We asked all users who previously purchased the game before F2P to login once to verify their purchase. You might have missed this, please reach out to us via Discord or blackgate@funtrainvr.com and we will get this solved!

reviews.review_description: I ended up buying the full game after a while of searching public lobbies for someone who had it. At first I enjoyed it, but the game quickly got boring when I realized how unfair it was for the astronauts. Even after me and my friends had learned how to play, it was very rare for them to ever win. Even when they strategized and worked together, they only won when I let them. We had already done a bunch of matches by this point and they should have had the experience to put up a fight. I expected more from a game with such amazing graphics and sounds.

developer_response.body: Thanks for playing Blackgate! Asymmetric multiplayer games are difficult to balance, as players on both sides can have wildly different levels of skill and knowledge of game mechanics. We're always trying to improve this, including some nerfs to the alien coming in the next week or so. We hope you return, and update your review when you enjoy this game more in the future!

developer_response.body: Let us  help you!  The Titan is $9.99 if you currently own the game,  OR you get it for free when you hit level 20.  You don't have to buy it! For new players, the Premium Apex Bundle of the game includes Titan for only  $5 more and is the best value to get all the  features of BlackGate.

reviews.review_title: Beutiful game, one small issue tho
reviews.review_description:
this game is great! it perfects everything from graphics to gameplay. Although there is a recurring issue, you need someone to be the alien for the game to start and to be the alien you need to buy the full game. 

Now i understand the buying part (you gotta get money somehow) but what this leads to is servers just filled with people who dont own the full game and are too stubborn to buy it or leave. 

A good idea to combat this issue would be to have a bot as the alien that has different difficulties and can be overridden by people with the full game so people can still play without having to wait ages for someone with the full game to join!

but overall this is a great game and one that people should at least give it a go! Just dont be stubborn if no one has the full game.
Its peack

reviews.review_description: I spent money for the full game and a dlc, but ever since the alien free weekend before this one, my account name doesn't show up, it's just a randomly generated three digit number, and the game doesn't let me pick a lobby, it just loads forever, not only that, but despite being an M rated game, several underage children are playing all the time, if they leave because they don't like being the engineer, which obviously includes being hunted by the alien, the entire game just ends so you can't win, and if the last person you need to kill as the alien leaves, you just can't end the game unless the host chooses play again or you leave, which is incredibly annoying because if the alien leaves, the engineers just instantly win, and back to the display name thing, it says to check your network and restart the game, it never works, I have restarted my headset, my game, and reconnected to the wifi, nothing ever works, and they removed the restore purchases in the in-game store, so even the dlc money isn't an option to refund, I don't get a lot of money in the first place, so spending money on a game that works, only for it to stop working after that is atrocious, all I want is my money back, but that is no longer an option anymore, despite the countless updates the game has had, and the same for my headset, it still never gets fixed, I would recommend to not buy anything for this game

reviews.review_description:
If you are considering this game then get it, almost everybody making 1 star reviews are people complaining about not having the full game even though they paid for it, which is bad, BUT if those people had more than a few braincells they would see that the devs are manually giving them the game if they actually bought it. The othe half of the reviews are people yelling about alien not being free to play, but in the devs defense it was originally pay to play it at all and if they made it completely free then the game would shut down, thats what happened to Echo vr and nobody wants to se a genuinely good game get shut down because Little kids want free to play. 

GET THE GAME, PLAY THE GAME, AND IF YOU DONT LIKE IT THEN DONT BUY IT, IF YOU DO LIKE IT THEN DONT MAKE AN ANGRY REVIEW BECAUSE YOU WONT BUY IT.

(old review)—>Blackgate is a phenomenal game and im super addicted to it right now, aside from being a great game it has a few flaws just like any good game does, 1st is the tutorial(s) i love how the game spawns you in the tutorial right at the start but it leaves a lot of confusion when you get playing(i personaly think they could make it so its less time consuming and a combat tutorial for both engineer and alien), 2nd is a slight imbalance in the power of the aliens first evolution, they made it so that the engineers can just do the bridge task and chase down the alien before it can do anything, 3rd is the weapons, there is a clear distinction in which weapons are the best and worst, best being the adhesive adherer and flamethrower and everything else is pretty useless in actual use vs the alien, i can personally look past this but eventually people want to use different weapons and its a little restricting when only two weapons effect the alien. Despite its flaws its an incredible game and the devs are working very hard to fix bugs and balancing the teams, as an added bonus you can often find some devs in the game playing with others and listening to the players. The devs make the players feel heard no matter how quiet the voice
dont have the words free to play if you have to have someone to buy the game to play it

reviews.review_description: I have tried a decent amount of Asymmetrical games, from Dead by Daylight, to Last Year, all the way to Inverse, and much more. While I enjoyed Inverse, It quickly got abandoned, and I was in need of a VR game like that. This is where Blackgate comes in. While I had heard about it, I was told it was a quest 3 title when it was first in development, so I quickly scrapped the idea of trying it until I found it again in the Quest 2 Appstore with a free tier. After trying it, it reminded me a lot of things, especially from Evolve, and Inverse. While I am still trying to learn the game, especially when it comes to fighting back, I do feel like I got the natural order down to enjoy what is given to me. There are definitely some issues like communication bugs and the fresh meat overpopulation to the point where we need a Walmart sale on the food for the alien to feast on (either an experimental player count increase, or maybe more sales on the full game), but the devs definitely put care and effort to the game and the community. I see passionate people trying to foster a community as I heard nothing but nice stories about them, as well as giveaways of the game even though this game hasn't been out for 2 months yet, and It's making me wonder if they are losing money being this endearing, which is perfect, because who wouldn't want to give money to indie game devs. I know I'd pay for this instead of the latest Call of Duty. Anyways I hope you guys give this game a try, I can't express how good it is to have a VR asym with a population, and you should keep this ball rolling, or enjoy it while it lasts.

developer_response.body: Thanks for all the nice things you said.   In this VR climate it's hard to find success, but we're doing our best and every bit helps.. Thanks for the review and being part of the journey.

developer_response.body: We try to encourage everybody to be nice in the game, but it can be very competitive.   Thanks for being in the BlackGate community.
